title: Clicking on "Updating Automations" doesn't work...the button is stuck
excerpt:
|I need to change the recipient of a notification in one of my automatons and when I go in and try to modify it, the automation doesn’t update. I just click the button and nothing happens. 
This has happened so many time…

posts.author: Savita2024 (Savita Ubhayakar)
posts.cookedHtml:
|I need to change the recipient of a notification in one of my automatons and when I go in and try to modify it, the automation doesn’t update. I just click the button and nothing happens.

This has happened so many times that it’s very frustrating. I have a video as well of what happens but it’s too big to add here.
Is this a known Monday.com glitch?
I also see a thing at the bottom that says Javascript void…does that have anything to do with this?

image1083×776 85.6 KB

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Savita,

The Automation sometimes is indeed a bit glitchy. Have you tried refreshing the page and trying again? I’ve noticed this sometimes help as it reloads all data of the board and automations.

If that doesn’t help I would advise to get in touch with Support as they might have more information on this issue.

Best,

Maarten

posts.author: abuislam (abuislam)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Savita, I can definitely understand your frustration! It sounds like a frustrating glitch. Have you tried refreshing the page or clearing your browser cache? Sometimes that can help. The ‘Javascript void’ message might be related, so it could be worth checking if there’s an issue with your browser settings. I hope you get it sorted soon!

posts.author: Savita2024 (Savita Ubhayakar)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you so much!! It seems to be working now for some reason. I just stopped doing anything with Monday.com for that day and then the next day I logged in and out and it seems to have worked. It could be something with our company internal IT…I’ve already contacted them and hope to get an answer. Thank you very much for your response! I really do appreciate all the help that I can get!!
